name: Bedford Area Family YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Bedford Area Family YMCA in Bedford, VA! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to lights. You can reserve the courts.

name: Bedford Country Club
description: Bedford Country Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bedford, VA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Boonsboro Country Club
description: Boonsboro Country Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lynchburg, VA. There are 8 outdoor clay and hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Crosswhite Athletic Club
description: Come play pickleball at Crosswhite Athletic Club in Lynchburg, VA! There are 6 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Downtown YMCA
description: Downtown YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lynchburg, VA. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. Players have access to restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Fairview Center
description: Fairview Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lynchburg, VA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Heritage Baptist Church
description: Heritage Baptist Church is a place to play pickleball in Lynchburg, VA. There are 3 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private. Reservations are not available.

name: Heritage High School
description: Heritage High School is a place to play pickleball in Lynchburg, VA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

description: Ivy Hill - Club Terrace H.O.A. is a place to play pickleball in Forest, VA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Ivy Hill Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Ivy Hill Country Club in Forest, VA! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved.

description: Jamerson YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Lynchburg, VA. There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: Lynchburg City Armory
description: Lynchburg City Armory is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lynchburg, VA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Mariners Landing
description: Mariners Landing is a place to play pickleball in Huddleston, VA. There are 12 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. The facility includes amenities like lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Oakwood Country Club - Tennis
description: Come play pickleball at Oakwood Country Club - Tennis in Lynchburg, VA! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms, trainers or lessons, a pro shop or equipment store, lights, and youth programming. A membership is required to play.

name: Tomahawk Elementary School
description: Tomahawk Elementary School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lynchburg, VA. There are 5 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are free.
